title: The First Bloom
label: Latebloomers
description: Latebloomers introduce The First Bloom, their debut EP, ready to heat up summer dancefloors.
From playful ghetto-infused house grooves to deeper, hypnotic cuts, The First Bloom brings together five artists connected by friendship and a shared love for underground dance music.

The A-side features Miami Beat$ representatives BeetWorldWide, Uncle Franky, and Teejay joining forces on two nostalgic, hip-hop-inspired cuts. On the B-side, label founders Roy Koch and DJ Z each deliver a solo track, exploring deeper grooves and planting the seed for the Latebloomers sound.
Rooted in the belief that growth unfolds at its own pace, The First Bloom marks the beginning of Latebloomers.

tracklist.title: Beet WorldWide & Teejay – Zalt Shaker (Tanzformer Remix)

seo.title: LATE001 The First Bloom — Latebloomers
seo.description: The First Bloom — debut vinyl release on Latebloomers featuring Beet WorldWide, Uncle Franky, Teejay, Roy Koch and DJ Z.
